I’d like some more please! (Extra Exercises)
i think if we have things sort of pre-written from labs that are interesting/useful but not crucial, we should have (some of) them available for students to deepen their understanding.

title: BLOCK 1 Formative Submission
text:
Skill
Question




C1: I can manage libraries/packages in R.
From week 1, submit Question 1


C2: I can modify the arguments of a given R function to arrive at the desired output.
From week 2, submit Question 3


V2: I can appropriately plot associations between two variables.
From week 3, submit Question 4


S2: I can compute appropriate measure(s) of dispersion for a given variable.
From week 3, submit Question 5


C4: I can extract specific subsets of a given dataset.
From week 4, submit Question 2


S1: I can compute appropriate measure(s) of association for a given pair of variables.
From week 5, submit Question 3
